message:
feat(rules): implement --pack filtering for robot rules list/test/lint

Adds pack_for_rule() to PatternLibrary and PatternEngine to look up
which pack provides a given rule ID. Uses this in the three robot rules
subcommands (list, test, lint) to filter results by pack name when the
--pack flag is provided.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
